description_long: This object is a classical acoustic guitar with a traditional hourglass-shaped wooden body and a flat top. The front features a circular sound hole centered below the strings, which run from the bridge on the body up to the headstock. The neck is long and slender, with visible frets and six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically on the headstock. The back of the guitar is smoothly contoured, and the sides are gently curved, giving the instrument its characteristic depth. The surface appears to be a uniform matte or satin finish, with no visible decorative inlays or pickguard. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for street performances or casual play in urban environments.
description: A classical acoustic guitar with a wooden hourglass body, six strings, and a simple, matte finish. Features a round sound hole and a symmetrical headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sound hole, six strings, bridge, and the full fretboard up to the headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's depth, curved body, and the thickness of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the guitar and the back of the headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same body depth and neck thickness as the other side.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo or distinctive cutouts
